title: lobelia chevalieri
intro: Lobelia chevalieri, also known as Chinese lobelia or Asian lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the Lobeliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia chevalieri include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing pain and inflammation in the body. Lobelia chevalieri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules for oral consumption, and can also be used topically as a poultice or cream.
